title: MinimalScaffold
description: One-screen output for routine/low-density decisions. Replaces FinalScaffold when /overture:clarify determines that the user's question is reversible, single-action, and confidence-high. The whole point: a 1-line decision + 1 quick check fits in one screen and stops bikeshedding. Anti-pattern: forcing a 5-section FinalScaffold onto a tab-rename decision (TC1 failure mode from 2026-04-28 reality test).

recommendation.description: Single-sentence imperative. 'Just rename it' / 'Don't change yet — wait for X signal.' Must be actionable in one read.

one_check.description: The ONE thing the user verifies in <5 minutes that would flip the recommendation. If they can't think of any flip-condition, recommendation is too weak.

caveat_if_signal_appears.description: Optional one-line caveat. 'If you see X after shipping, revert.' Use only when reversibility has a non-trivial signal.

skipped.description: What was deliberately skipped vs FinalScaffold (team, boss, debate). Transparency for the user.
